commands.review_summary:
The PR archives reset-time trajectory runtime and pointer artifacts beside session transcript reset archives, updates artifact classifiers and retention cleanup, and adds regression coverage.

PR surface: Source +177, Tests +277. Total +454 across 5 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Current main source archives only transcript candidates on reset, and the PR body includes copied live before/after output showing default trajectory loss on main and preservation on the branch; I did not run a live gateway reset in this read-only review.
